title: Stately CLI project configuration
description: Configuration for mapping local machine files to a Stately Studio project.

version.description: Schema version for statelyai.json, expressed as a semantic version string.

studioUrl.description: Base URL of the Studio instance that owns the project.

defaultXStateVersion.description: Default XState major version for sources that do not override it. Only XState 5+ is supported.

include.description: Glob patterns for local files to scan.

newMachineDir.description: Directory, relative to statelyai.json, where statelyai pull should create new local files for remote-only project machines.

globPattern.description: A glob pattern evaluated relative to the statelyai.json location.
